segments.text: It's nice to see so many Sahaja Yogis coming here during the Christmas puja.
Christianity has spread all over the world and there are
There are so many, so called Christians who say they follow Christ.
I don't know from which angle – Christ was the embodiment of Paramchaitanya!
He was Omkara he was Shri Ganesha and those following him have to be very different people
But always happens in every religion, that they go at random into the opposite direction.
Completely opposite!
The essence of Christ life was detachment and sacrifice
For a person who is detached there's nothing like sacrifice
He sees his live as just drama
Such a great personality came on this earth and created the so-called Christian religion
which has gone into wars, all kinds of hypocritical things.
And now people are discovering about it
He stood for truth
and Christians don't know what is the truth is
The truth that you're spirit
and you have to become the Spirit. He is the one who has talked about second birth of Realization,
but they've forgotten what he said –what we are to achieve! It's such a funny thing
that all these great people came on this earth and created proper religion for our
And I don't know how people have become so stupid with the teachings of this,
So called their masters.
It's all money oriented apart from that it is not standing on truth
I think this is the second crucifixion of these religions, there's no religion which
following really their principles as being described.
i don't know how they manage to twist truth in that manner just make some money or some
fuss such a ritualistic stuff going on in the name of Christ.
Though they have faltered so many times and had experience of such a bad influence on

today did You became Musalman just
To Kill Yourself And Commit Suicide calling it as a ritual they are saying

How can You?
As Muslims they are not so details –
Not at all!

how would We do Go through The Heavens
where we'll have enjoyment of Jannah?
There's no reasoning
but All These Maulana's first off-all
have finished their education, to keep jatana.
Have finish there education

You've got your vibrations

We will go to Jihad."

people have crossed all the Mariyadas
All things of religion

They were surprised how
they have forgotten of morality. They've no sense of morality and

making money out

Chappals in Afghanistan
they were beating her
Kill them and so many people in India
especially north

In the North I am I will marry it in The North
And i know how

So north of India is already contaminated by these people and the south is contaminated

But one thing could be that Hindu religion has now become so much out of date – you

So many have been corrected in my own lifetime I was surprised how they do it but Muslims

For example, I started a place for the women who are left out in world alone or like orphans

ritualism through this Brahmin-ism

Whatever You may Say ,he had said it where ? said he went to one wedding in

That doesn't mean

but drinking even in India has become very common

Malich

For filth so He told him
Why don't you go and teach them Nirmala Tatva?

This Is What You should ask for otherwise it's all darkness

How have they achieved it?

How will the people do them?

Now you have to understand,
